Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common questions about Ohio Natural Gas plans.

How do I switch to Ohio Natural Gas?

Switching is easy. Simply choose a plan, provide your current utility account number, and complete enrollment online. We handle the rest.

What is a fixed-rate plan?

A fixed-rate plan locks in your rate per CCF for the duration of your contract, protecting you from market fluctuations.

Is there an early termination fee?

Fixed-rate plans include a $50 early termination fee if you cancel before the contract ends. Variable-rate plans have no cancellation fee.
